title: test_authentication_and_session_management
description: Verify user can successfully log in with valid credentials and access the dashboard, and that invalid credentials show appropriate validation errors.

title: test_dashboard_and_trends_overview
description: Verify the dashboard displays correct summary counts for devices, projects, and recent test runs, and that trend charts update correctly when applying time range filters.

title: test_device_management_crud_operations
description: Verify adding a new device, viewing device details including fingerprint and history, and creating/editing device profiles function correctly.

title: test_project_management_functionality
description: Verify creating a new project, saving it, and assigning devices to the project works as expected with correct listing.

title: test_test_runs_and_live_execution
description: Verify starting a new test run with a template against selected devices shows live output streaming, and completed test runs display summarized results and findings.

title: test_network_scanning_and_discovery
description: Verify starting a network discovery scan for an IP range returns discovered devices and open ports, and that selected devices can be added to inventory.

title: test_reporting_and_export_features
description: Verify creating and generating reports with selected scope and format works, and that audit logs can be filtered and exported as CSV.

title: test_device_comparison_view
description: Verify selecting multiple devices for comparison displays side-by-side configuration and vulnerability differences along with risk summary.

title: test_agents_registration_and_real_time_terminal
description: Verify registering a new agent with metadata, viewing heartbeat status, and starting remote test runs with live terminal output streaming.

title: test_administration_and_audit_logging
description: Verify admin user creation with role assignment, viewing audit logs with filters, detailed entries, and exporting filtered logs as CSV.
